entries.source: Check each step, correct errors, and connect procedures to concepts.
entries.value: प्रत्येक step तपासा, errors correct करा आणि procedures concepts शी जोडा.

entries.source: Check one step before the whole answer
entries.value: पूर्ण answer आधी एक step तपासा

entries.source: Check the reasoning line by line
Check this step in my working. If it is wrong, explain the mistake and give me one next move.
entries.value: माझ्या working मधील हा टप्पा तपासा. तो चुकीचा असल्यास, चूक स्पष्ट करा आणि मला पुढची एक चाल द्या.

entries.source: Check what fields my citation is missing
entries.value: माझ्या सायटेशनमध्ये कोणती माहिती कमी आहे ते तपासा

entries.source: Checking understanding, getting unstuck, and building confidence through active practice.
entries.value: active practice द्वारे understanding तपासणे, unstuck होणे आणि confidence तयार करणे.

entries.source: checking whether the learner can explain the idea back.
entries.value: learner idea परत explain करू शकतो का ते तपासणे.

entries.source: Checks that keep the learning honest

Children below the age of 13 are encouraged to use the app, but under adult supervision. However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. If you are a parent of a child under 13 years of age and you believe your child has provided us with Personal Information, we will take necessary actions and notify you if necessary. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.
entries.value: 13 वर्षांखालील मुलांना app वापरण्यास प्रोत्साहन आहे, पण adult supervision अंतर्गत. तथापि, आम्ही 13 वर्षांखालील मुलांकडून कोणतीही Personal Information जाणूनबुजून collect किंवा process करत नाही आणि parental consent शिवाय 13 वर्षांखालील कोणत्याही user ने आम्हाला personal information देणे स्पष्टपणे prohibit करतो. तुम्ही 13 वर्षांखालील मुलाचे parent असाल आणि तुमच्या child ने आम्हाला Personal Information दिली आहे असे तुम्हाला वाटत असेल, तर आम्ही necessary actions घेऊ आणि गरज असल्यास तुम्हाला notify करू. necessary action साठी fixed timeline नाही, कारण ते आम्ही handle करत असलेल्या queries च्या volume आणि available workforce वर अवलंबून असते.

entries.source: Choose fair metrics, anti-gaming rules, and reset cadence.
entries.value: fair metrics, anti-gaming rules आणि reset cadence निवडा.

entries.source: Choose generated focus audio for reading, writing, problem solving, or deep work. It keeps playing while you switch to other chats.
entries.value: वाचन, लेखन, समस्या निवारण किंवा डीप वर्कसाठी जनरेट केलेले फोकस ऑडिओ निवडा. तुम्ही इतर चॅट्सवर स्विच करता तेव्हाही ते वाजत राहते.

entries.value: हातातील task साठी योग्य public guest learning mode निवडणे.

entries.source: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties आणि public policy शिका.

entries.value: civics प्रशिक्षक AI शिकण्याचा mode: practical मार्गदर्शक

entries.value: Civics Coach prompts आणि study loop

entries.source: Clarify country/context if needed, then explain the institution or idea simply.
entries.value: गरज असल्यास country/context स्पष्ट करा, मग institution किंवा idea सोप्या भाषेत explain करा.

entries.source: Clarify goal, deadline, resources, and done criteria.
entries.value: goal, deadline, resources आणि done criteria स्पष्ट करा.

entries.source: Clarify role, goal, stakes, and tone; then begin in character.
entries.value: role, goal, stakes आणि tone स्पष्ट करा; मग character मध्ये सुरू करा.

entries.source: Clarify the personality, topic, and learner's side before beginning.
entries.value: सुरू करण्यापूर्वी personality, topic आणि learner ची side स्पष्ट करा.

entries.source: Clarify the question and identify variables or the core concept.
entries.value: question स्पष्ट करा आणि variables किंवा core concept ओळखा.

entries.source: Clarify the question and offer two or three angles.
entries.value: question स्पष्ट करा आणि दोन किंवा तीन angles द्या.

entries.source: Clarify the question, add evidence, summarize replies, and plan follow-up.
entries.value: question स्पष्ट करा, evidence जोडा, replies summarize करा आणि follow-up plan करा.

entries.source: Clear answers for learners, schools, and search systems.
entries.value: learners, schools आणि search systems साठी clear answers.

entries.source: Clear boundaries for a public AI learning platform.
entries.value: public AI learning platform साठी clear boundaries.

entries.source: Close with a recap or review plan you can use later.
entries.value: नंतर वापरता येईल अशा recap किंवा review plan ने close करा.

entries.source: Cluster, tag, summarize, connect, and turn notes into review prompts.
entries.value: cluster करा, tag करा, summarize करा, connect करा आणि notes ला review prompts मध्ये बदला.

entries.source: Coach homework ethically by supporting the learner's process.
entries.value: learner च्या process ला support करून homework ethically coach करा.

entries.source: Coach interview preparation through practice and feedback.
entries.value: practice आणि feedback द्वारे interview preparation coach करा.

entries.source: Coach learners through project planning and execution.
entries.value: project planning आणि execution मधून learners ला coach करा.

entries.source: Coach the learner without shaming them. Ask for context when needed. Be clear about uncertainty. Do not claim to verify live facts unless tools are explicitly available.
entries.value: learner ला shame न करता coach करा. गरज असल्यास context विचारा. uncertainty बद्दल clear रहा. tools explicitly available नसतील तर live facts verify केल्याचा दावा करू नका.

entries.value: diagrams, sketches, maps आणि labels द्वारे visual thinking coach करा.

entries.source: Coach writing from idea to revision while preserving the learner's voice.
entries.value: learner चा voice जपून idea पासून revision पर्यंत writing coach करा.

entries.value: Building करून Programming शिकण्यासाठी Code Tutor

entries.value: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: code समजा, errors debug करा, concepts शिका आणि small projects step by step build करा.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.

ideas text मध्ये visually connect करा.

entries.value: events, ideas, institutions, places, values आणि tradeoffs जोडणे.

entries.source: Convert the user goal into a rough shared artifact before giving advice. Start with: "I made the first rough structure. Edit anything. I will react to your changes." Ask at most one practical context question if needed, but still create the starter structure.
entries.value: advice देण्यापूर्वी user goal ला rough shared artifact मध्ये convert करा. सुरुवात करा: "मी पहिली rough structure तयार केली. काहीही edit करा. तुमच्या changes वर मी react करेन." गरज असल्यास जास्तीत जास्त एक practical context question विचारा, पण starter structure तरीही तयार करा.

entries.value: रिकाम्या जागा भरा, बहुपर्यायी प्रश्न (MCQs), चूक/बरोबर, थोडक्यात उत्तरे आणि जोड्या लावा यांसारख्या प्रश्न प्रकारांसह वर्कशीट्स तयार करा.

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, and unexpected angles.
entries.value: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments आणि unexpected angles brainstorm करा.

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: creative Brainstormer AI शिकण्याचा mode: practical मार्गदर्शक

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer prompts and study loop
entries.value: Creative Brainstormer prompts आणि study loop

entries.source: Curiosity, practice, and AI that teaches.
Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: कशाबद्दलही उत्सुक आहात? विचारा, एक्सप्लोर करा आणि तुमच्या गतीने अधिक सखोल शिका. तुमचा सोबती कल्पनांना व्यावहारिक, संस्मरणीय आणि विकसित करण्यास सोपे बनवतो. प्रयत्न करा: "शेअर मार्केट प्रत्यक्षात कसे काम करते ते स्पष्ट करा."

entries.source: Curious learners exploring context, arguments, people, texts, and ideas.
entries.value: context, arguments, people, texts आणि ideas explore करणारे curious learners.

entries.source: Curious learners exploring history, humanities, argument, and big questions.
entries.value: history, humanities, argument आणि big questions explore करणारे curious learners.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel alive without confusing simulation for sources.
entries.value: simulation ला sources समजू न देता history आणि ideas जिवंत वाटाव्यात असे इच्छिणारे curious learners.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel situated, debatable, and alive without losing track of evidence.
entries.value: इतिहास आणि कल्पना evidence विसरता न जाता context मध्ये, चर्चनीय आणि जिवंत वाटाव्यात असे इच्छिणारे जिज्ञासू शिकणारे.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: जिज्ञासू शिकणारे, विद्यार्थी, पालक आणि स्वतःहून शिकणारे निर्माते ज्यांना सुरुवात करण्यासाठी एक मैत्रीपूर्ण जागा हवी आहे.

entries.source: Custom AI learning spaces for every school community.
entries.value: प्रत्येक school community साठी custom AI learning spaces.
